nasb.text: Throw out the worthless slave into the outer darkness; in that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.

esv.text: And cast the worthless servant into the outer darkness. In that place there will be weeping and gnashing of teeth.’

cnv.text: 把這沒有用的僕人丟在外面的黑暗裡，在那裡必要哀哭切齒。’

ccb.text: 把这没用的奴仆扔进外边的黑暗里，他必在那里哀哭切齿。’

csbs.text: 把这个无用的奴仆丢到外面的黑暗里去！在那里将有哀哭和切齿。’
